title: Tetrionl Easy Spray Hi-Build White Primer 400ml - Quick-Drying Multi-Surface Aerosol
features: FAST COVERAGE : Achieve fast, efficient coverage on wood, metal, ceramic, and plastic with this highly visible hi-build white primer, perfect for quick projects
EASY APPLICATION : Convenient aerosol spray design with quick-drying technology makes it simple to use. Perfect for DIY enthusiasts' painting supplies
QUICK-DRYING FORMULA : Cuts down waiting time with its quick-drying formula, providing high-quality results efficiently and effectively
HIGH BUILD QUALITY : Tetrion's Hi-Build White Primer delivers a glossy, uniform coating, enhancing the appearance and longevity of your surfaces
VERSATILE USAGE: Ideal for a multitude of surfaces including metal, wood, ceramic, and plastic, ensuring a professional finish every time.
